gate.auth-preflight.title: auth preflight gate
gate.auth-preflight.description: Add a reusable login/session-validity check before execution.

gate.timeout-budget.title: timeout budget gate
gate.timeout-budget.description: Add wait-budget checks or split long actions before dispatch.

gate.human-approval.title: human approval gate
gate.human-approval.description: Add a clear human approval or access check before sensitive steps.

gate.rate-limit-pacing.title: rate-limit pacing gate
gate.rate-limit-pacing.description: Add pacing and cooldown controls before retries.

gate.quality-contextdb.title: quality contextdb gate
gate.quality-contextdb.description: Repair context pack/index behavior before dispatch.

gate.quality-log-audit.title: quality log audit gate
gate.quality-log-audit.description: Remove accidental debug logs or tighten the allowlist for intentional CLI output.

gate.quality-security.title: quality security gate
gate.quality-security.description: Repair the security checklist before dispatch.

gate.verification-results.title: wire real verification results
gate.verification-results.description: Attach structured verification telemetry to checkpoints.

gate.blocked-triage.title: blocked triage gate
gate.blocked-triage.description: Blocked checkpoints indicate missing inputs; triage before promotion.

runbook.tool-repair.title: tooling repair runbook
runbook.tool-repair.description: Capture the recovery path for tool/runtime failures.

runbook.dispatch-merge-triage.title: dispatch merge triage runbook
runbook.dispatch-merge-triage.description: Resolve blocked handoffs or overlapping file ownership before parallel execution.

runbook.dispatch-runtime-unavailable.title: dispatch runtime unavailable runbook
runbook.dispatch-runtime-unavailable.description: Local dry-run is supported; live runtime is opt-in and may be unimplemented.
runbook.dispatch-runtime-unavailable.nextCommand: node scripts/aios.mjs orchestrate --dispatch local --execute dry-run --format json

runbook.failure-triage.title: failure triage runbook
runbook.failure-triage.description: Document a short triage path before promoting the workflow.

runbook.retry-budget-policy.title: retry budget policy runbook
runbook.retry-budget-policy.description: Standardize retry limits and cooldowns for unstable runs.

checklist.verification-standard.title: promote verification checklist
checklist.verification-standard.description: Standardize verification via quality-gate and stable evidence capture.
